meaning: <法>Confederation Generale du Travail (法国) 总工会(=General Confederation of Labour)
examples: This paper introduces the combinatorial geometry package CGT with the capability of the torus geometric treatment.
Canada's CAE (12, CGT ) is the world leader in flight simulators and pilot training.
Alistair Darling announced last month that CGT would be charged at a single rate of 18%.
"We were hostile because we didn't believe in his project, " said Michael Wamen, CGT's representative for the plant.
